name: HDFC MoneyBack Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹50,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 2 Reward Points per ₹150 spent on all purchases
5X Reward Points on all online transactions (10 RP per ₹150)

welcomeBenefits.description: 500 bonus Reward Points on card activation

additionalBenefits: 5X reward points on all online spends
Easy EMI conversion on large purchases
Access to HDFC SmartBuy portal for deals
pros: 5X rewards on online spends is good for an entry-level card
Very low annual fee of ₹500 with easy ₹50K waiver
Good starter card to build HDFC relationship for upgrades
Fuel surcharge waiver saves on regular fuel purchases
cons: Low point value at ₹0.20 per Reward Point
No lounge access of any kind
3.5% forex markup is high for international transactions
Base reward rate of 2 RP per ₹150 translates to just 0.27% return
idealFor: First-time credit card users looking for a low-cost entry card
Online shoppers who want better rewards on digital transactions
Users building an HDFC credit history for future upgrades

faqs.question: What is the effective reward rate on the HDFC MoneyBack card?
faqs.answer: The base reward rate is 2 RP per ₹150 spent, with each point worth ₹0.20. This gives an effective return of about 0.27% on offline spends and ~1.33% on online spends (with the 5X multiplier).

faqs.question: Can I get the annual fee waived?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹500 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹50,000 or more in the previous anniversary year, which is very achievable with regular use.

faqs.question: Does the HDFC MoneyBack card offer lounge access?
faqs.answer: No, the MoneyBack card does not include any complimentary lounge access. For lounge benefits, consider upgrading to a mid-tier or premium HDFC card.
